detailed model output for Saturn's 100-mbar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
this model is the reference geoid assumed to be rigidly rotating with a period 10h 35m.
mu=sin(phi), phi [radians], and lat_deg [degrees] refer to planetocentric latitude; lat_pg_deg gives planetographic latitude in degrees.
